gold.title: Tag Selector
gold.reason: Versatile tag selector with search, creation, and keyboard navigation — polished enough for onboarding and filter UX on marketing sites.

gold.title: Input with tags
gold.reason: Tag input with inline chip creation — widely used pattern with clean implementation great for contact and filter forms.

silver.title: Tag Group [react-aria-components]
silver.reason: Accessible tag group with selection support using react-aria — good quality and accessible but more utility-focused.

silver.title: Selector Chips
silver.reason: Selectable chip group — clean multi-select pattern useful for filter and preference sections.

silver.title: Tags Input
silver.reason: Tags input field — functional pattern for forms and CMS interfaces.

silver.title: Avatar Chips
silver.reason: Chips with avatar — useful people-picker pattern for invite and mention flows.

bronze.title: Chip
bronze.reason: Basic chip component — minimal above a styled span; lacks interactivity or grouping logic.
